---
title: "About"
---

This site is hosted on GitHub Pages and is linked to from my main academic and professional profile.

For current institutional information, see my [McMaster profile](https://experts.mcmaster.ca/display/racinej). For package-oriented examples and current code snippets, see the [Gallery of Code](https://jeffreyracine.github.io/gallery/).

You can contact me at [racinej@mcmaster.ca](mailto:racinej@mcmaster.ca).

This Research site is intended as the corpus-level companion to my books and software. It points readers to public book resources, software documentation, package repositories, and teaching-material request instructions.
